name: Swerve & Survive
author: Poki
description: Swerve & Survive is a puzzle platformer where survival is your ultimate goal! With only left and right controls, you must swerve your way through deadly platforms, tricky traps, and unexpected obstacles. Try to find the finish line, and precision and quick reflexes are key! Do you have what it takes to survive? How to play Swerve & Survive? Move left: A or the left arrow key Move right: D or the right arrow key Who created Swerve & Survive? Swerve & Survive is created by BasicTerra. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Swerve & Survive for free? You can play Swerve & Survive for free on Poki. Can I play Swerve & Survive on mobile devices and desktop? Swerve & Survive can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
